chk_campaign_trash_coherence.name: chk_campaign_trash_coherence
chk_campaign_trash_coherence.value:
(status = 'trashed' AND trashed_at IS NOT NULL AND purge_eligible_at IS NOT NULL)
    OR
    (status IN ('active', 'importing') AND trashed_at IS NULL AND trashed_by_user_id IS NULL AND purge_eligible_at IS NULL)

chk_visibility_grants_principal.name: chk_visibility_grants_principal
chk_visibility_grants_principal.value:
("visibility_grants"."scope" = 'specific_player' and "visibility_grants"."player_id" is not null and "visibility_grants"."user_id" is null)
    or ("visibility_grants"."scope" = 'specific_user' and "visibility_grants"."user_id" is not null and "visibility_grants"."player_id" is null)
    or ("visibility_grants"."scope" not in ('specific_player', 'specific_user') and "visibility_grants"."user_id" is null and "visibility_grants"."player_id" is null)

chk_campaign_messages_recipient.name: chk_campaign_messages_recipient
chk_campaign_messages_recipient.value: ("campaign_messages"."audience" = 'player' and "campaign_messages"."recipient_player_id" is not null) or ("campaign_messages"."audience" <> 'player' and "campaign_messages"."recipient_player_id" is null)

chk_purge_jobs_coherence.name: chk_purge_jobs_coherence
chk_purge_jobs_coherence.value:
(status = 'running' AND worker_id IS NOT NULL AND lease_token IS NOT NULL AND lease_expires_at IS NOT NULL)
    OR
    (status <> 'running' AND worker_id IS NULL AND lease_token IS NULL AND lease_expires_at IS NULL)

chk_purge_jobs_completed.name: chk_purge_jobs_completed
chk_purge_jobs_completed.value:
(status = 'completed' AND completed_at IS NOT NULL)
    OR
    (status <> 'completed' AND completed_at IS NULL)
